overview: VidVault is a personal video library app where you can upload, organize, and watch your downloaded videos. Organize videos into collections, tag them for cross-collection search, batch-select multiple videos for bulk actions, and share your library with others via public links.
features: Upload and manage personal videos with titles, descriptions, and thumbnails
Tag videos for cross-collection search and filtering
Batch select multiple videos to tag, move, or delete in bulk
Generate shareable links scoped to your full library, a collection, or a tag
Full-featured video player with Internet Identity authentication
